description: Real-time monitoring for all microservices, infrastructure, and system health

targets.expr: avg(histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(auth_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])) by (le)) or histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(user_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])) by (le)) or histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(chat_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])) by (le)))
